ops.body: Done in dcfaa47 (PR #2, v0.31.0): C1 — tsx/css/scss/vue grammars added to build-chunk-grammars.sh (pins match tree-sitter-language-pack 1.6.2; tsx reuses the typescript repo), 4 new corpus fixtures + all goldens regenerated from the semble 0.5.2 oracle, embed +330 KB (~4.4 MB total), NDCG gate re-ran PASS benchmark-neutral (evidence on log 5e69ae9d). I2 — chunk.Chunk no longer drops walker-admitted unknown-ext files (line-chunks; ContentData skip gated on ok); regression tests incl. single-file-repo case. C4 — decodeReplace → DecodeReplace emits one U+FFFD per maximal invalid subsequence (Python errors="replace" parity), now used by the production index path too (review finding fixed with TestIndexDecodesMaximalSubsequences).
